title: athyrium distentifolium subsp. americanum
intro: Athyrium distentifolium subsp. americanum, also known as American lady fern, is a subspecies of fern belonging to the Athyrium genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The American lady fern is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, acting as an antiseptic, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
